label.span: Do you have a national ID?

option.t-att-selected: (has_uid and option.name == 'Yes') or (not has_uid and option.id == have_national_id_selection_id)

div.div: UID must be exactly 12 Digits Only.

div.style: display: {% if not has_uid %}block{% else %}none{% endif %};
div.div: RID must be exactly 29 digits only.

label.span: Is the farmer the head of the household?
Do you have a personal phone number?

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if option.id in (beneficiary.hh_income_type.ids or []) else None

label.span: Are you a member of a primary cooperative?
What is the name of the primary cooperative?
Are you a member of a cooperative union?
What is the name of the cooperative union?
Are you a member of a Farmer Production Cluster (FPC)?
What is the primary commodity produced by your FPC?
What is your role in the FPC?

div.div: This section is only for Crop or Mixed farming types.

label.span: What's your water source for crop production?

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if option.id in (beneficiary.crop_water_sources.ids or []) else None

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row w-lg-auto col-lg-11 land_container2
d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row w-lg-auto col-lg-11 land_container2

div.div: This section is only for Livestock or Mixed farming types.

label.span: What's your water source for livestock production?

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if option.id in (beneficiary.livestock_water_sources.ids or []) else None

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row w-lg-auto col-lg-11 land_container2

label.span: What kind of animals do you own?
How many animals do you own?

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row w-lg-auto col-lg-11 land_container2

label.span: What kind of animals do you own?
How many animals do you own?

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row w-lg-auto col-lg-11 land_container2

label.span: What kind of animals do you own?
How many animals do you own?

div.div: This section is only for Crop or Mixed farming types.

label.span: Do you use fertiliser on your farm?
Do you use pesticide on your farm?
Do you use insecticide on your farm?
Do you use improved seeds on your farm?

div.div: This section is only for Crop or Mixed farming types.

label.span: What kind of machinery do you use?

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if option.id in (beneficiary.type_of_machinery.ids or []) else None

label.span: Do you have access to financial services?
What type of finance access do you have?

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if option.id in (beneficiary.finance_accesses.ids or []) else None

t.t-value: json.dumps([{'label': pl.name, 'value': pl.id} for pl in primary_language])
